title: Software - NODE
content: Software The Behavioral Layer Program your creations using the Arduino IDE and our custom-built behaviors.

title: Node - Educational Learning Kit
content: NODE Kit 1: Programming with Cardboard Discover More The Core Shift From Assembly to Iteration Traditional kits teach you to follow instructions. NODE turns cardboard into an intelligent medium where you Design, Test, Fail, and Iterate. This is the missing layer in engineering education. System Architecture Cardboard is not a cheap substitute—it's a sketching medium for physical systems. 📦 Physical Layer Modular connectors turn electronics into "plug-in art supplies" that integrate directly into cardboard structures. The Hardware → 💻 Digital Layer Arduino-based control with a "behavior-first" philosophy. Describe how your system reacts to the world. The Software → 🔄 Interaction Layer A tight design loop: Test physical response, observe failure modes, and redesign instantly. The Loop → Designed for Every Learner 🎨 The Maker Expressive, narrative-driven robotics using everyday materials. Ruijia 🛠️ The Student Prototype smart products without wiring complexity or abstract barriers. Darren 🏫 The Teacher Low-cost, high-engagement STEM that scales across classrooms. Mr. Jialong

title: NODE Starter Kit - Info
content: 📦 Flagship Kit NODE Starter Kit The NODE Starter Kit is the foundation of the ecosystem. It provides the core controller and all essential components to transform ordinary cardboard into interactive robots. • Arduino-compatible NODE Controller • 4x High-torque Micro Servos • 10x Precision Cardboard Templates • Modular Plastic Connectors • Comprehensive Project Guide Buy Now

title: Sensor Expansion Kit - Info
content: 🔌 Expansion Pack Sensor Expansion Kit Take your NODE projects to the next level with advanced sensory input. This kit allows your robots to see, hear, and react to the world around them. • Ultrasonic Distance Sensor • Ambient Light Sensor • Sound Level Module • RGB LED for Visual Feedback • Extra Connection Cables Buy Now
